summary: Iteration 44 - Partenaire Phase 2 features testing. Fixed Orientation IA import error (Chat -> LlmChat). All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: 5 tabs, 6 metrics with linked_profiles, alertes panel, link/unlink dialog, diagnostic enrichi form, linked profile view, orientation IA interface, observatoire contribution.
seed_data_creation: 4 beneficiaires seeded. Sophie Bernard linked to bob18. Claire Moreau linked. 3 profils lies total.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partenaire Phase 2 features fully functional. Fixed emergentintegrations import (LlmChat, UserMessage, send_message async). Dashboard shows 6 metrics including linked_profiles. Alertes panel shows critical freins. Link/unlink dialog with user search works. Diagnostic enrichi form saves to beneficiaire. Linked profile view shows Re'Actif Pro profile, passport, D'CLIC results. Orientation IA generates recommendations via GPT-4.1-mini. Observatoire contribution creates signals in ubuntoo_signals collection.

backend_api.POST_beneficiaires_orientation: PASSED - Generates AI orientation with metiers, formations, dispositifs

frontend_ui.beneficiaire_detail_view: PASSED - Shows name, sector, status, progress, linked badge

bug_fix_applied.issue: Orientation IA endpoint returning 500 with import error
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Wrong import: 'from emergentintegrations.llm.chat import Chat, Message' - Chat and Message classes don't exist
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed to 'from emergentintegrations.llm.chat import LlmChat, UserMessage' and updated API usage to LlmChat(api_key, session_id, system_message).with_model('openai', 'gpt-4.1-mini') and await chat.send_message(user_message)

mocked_api.note: All APIs are real. Orientation IA uses GPT-4.1-mini via emergentintegrations LlmChat.
